title: salvia amethystina subsp. ampelophylla
intro: Salvia amethystina subsp. ampelophylla, also known as the 'Rocky Mountain Sage', is a subspecies of Salvia amethystina, a perennial herb native to the mountainous regions of Mexico. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its essential oils, which have anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits associated with Salvia amethystina subsp. ampelophylla include its ability to relieve respiratory issues, reduce stress and anxiety, and aid in the treatment of skin conditions and wounds. The herbal preparations of this plant typically involve making teas, infusions, or tinctures from its leaves and flowers, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
